headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Xcel Energy, Lowers Price Target to $91
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Jeremy Tonet   maintains Xcel Energy (NASDAQ:XEL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $94 to $91.
